---
title: 'Monster Yogurt'
date: '2012-12-31T21:38:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'The Life In Fort Worth Blog'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '7540367875878416159'
blogger_filename: '/2013/03/monster-yogurt.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/The Life In Fort Worth Blog/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Discover'
---

<br />
<h1 data-mce-style="text-align: center;" style="font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 2.4em; font-weight: normal; line-height: 1.5em; margin: 0px 0px 20px; text-align: center;">
<strong>Monster Yogurt</strong></h1>
<div data-mce-style="text-align: center;" style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px; text-align: center;">
</div>
<div data-mce-style="text-align: center;" style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px; text-align: center;">
<a data-mce-href="http://www.scarytastesgood.com/" href="http://www.scarytastesgood.com/" style="color: #743399;" target="_blank" title="Monster Yogurt">http://www.scarytastesgood.com/</a></div>
<div data-mce-style="text-align: center;" style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/monster-yogurt-342ab5878578.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/monster-yogurt-342ab5878578.jpg" height="110" width="320" /></a><br />
<br /></div>
<div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
</div>
<div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
<h4>
Fro Yo!&nbsp;</h4>
Well there is a new place you can add to your list of must visits in Dallas Texas. What an amazing concept. Not only is this great,&nbsp;<strong style="color: black;">high quality frozen yogurt,</strong>&nbsp;but it has so many toppings to choose from. There are containers on three walls with&nbsp;<strong style="color: black;">options, options, options.</strong>&nbsp;Then at the register you have your traditional fruits, and brownies, and cookie dough, etc. If there were nothing more than this, which is true for most other frozen yogurt places, it would still be worth a visit to this place. But that is where Monster Yogurt takes their restaurant concept to a whole new level.</div>
<div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
It's always nice to find a new great place to take the kids. Monster Yogurt provided an excellent experience. You walk in to a well decorated, bright, cheery little Yogurt shop. There is a wonderful playground to one side in it's own room, cut's down the noise, with it's own seating area built just for the little ones. Just outside of the playground, on the other side of the glass is the adults seating area. This is the perfect place to stop off for a quick treat at any time of day, or grab your book, kindle, or laptop and enjoy their free WiFi.</div>
<div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
</div>
<div data-mce-style="text-align: left;" style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
Whereas so many of these yogurt places have hard plastic like seats that invite you to leave as soon as your are done, this place has comfortable chairs to sit in, with a more coffee shop like feel.&nbsp;<strong style="color: black;">Free WiFi.</strong>&nbsp;An assortment of non-traditional cold drinks, like Jones Soda! They even have a drip&nbsp;<strong style="color: black;">coffee bar for FREE</strong>&nbsp;just to help you enjoy your experience further, warm coffee with your cold yogurt? Yummm.... The free coffee is part of their grass-roots effort&nbsp;<strong style="color: black;">to help local charities</strong>. Any donation you can provide will be sent to the featured charity for that month. "Give and ye shall receive" is being lived out in this little shop.</div>
<div data-mce-style="text-align: left;" style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
To all of this they add something that sent me over the top. My wife and I are always discussing restaurant concepts as we are wanting to open one someday. We were just saying recently how we'd love to see more with playgrounds, even yogurt places.</div>
<div data-mce-style="text-align: left;" style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
Well Monster Yogurt did it!&nbsp;<strong style="color: black;">They have a playground and you can bring the kids in and let them play.</strong></div>
<div data-mce-style="text-align: left;" style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
The President, Ava Skipworth, calls it a coffee shop for parents. Next time you are going to meet with someone to talk, but need to bring the kids along, just meet at&nbsp;<strong style="color: black;">Monster Yogurt! It's in Dallas, TX on 9540 Garland Road.</strong>&nbsp;As someone who is keenly interested in successful business ventures, I am very happy to see that this theme is so well thought out, from decor and concept to execution. Having been open just less than one year, they have already hit the top of the charts as one of the best places to visit when you are in Dallas.</div>
<div data-mce-style="text-align: left;" style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
My family heads in to Dallas often for the Museum, Zoo, and now the Arboretum. This place is just a quick drive over from there. Spend the day having fun, then jump over to Monster Yogurt for a great time and fun treat before heading to the car for the hour drive back home.</div>
<div data-mce-style="text-align: left;" style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
<strong style="color: black;">My kids gave this place a major thumbs up too! This place will be a must visit on many of our upcoming trips. I strongly suggest you make it part of yours as well!&nbsp;DW</strong></div>
<div data-mce-style="text-align: left;" style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
<strong style="color: black;"><br /></strong></div>
<div data-mce-style="text-align: left;" style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
<h4 style="text-align: center;">
<br /></h4>
</div>
<div data-mce-style="text-align: left;" style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<br />
<a data-mce-href="http://www.urbanspoon.com/r/13/1679127/restaurant/East-Dallas-Lakewood/Monster-Yogurt-Dallas" href="http://www.urbanspoon.com/r/13/1679127/restaurant/East-Dallas-Lakewood/Monster-Yogurt-Dallas" style="color: #743399; text-align: center;"><img alt="Monster Yogurt on Urbanspoon" class="aligncenter" data-mce-src="/images/imported/www-urbanspoon-com/biglink-1ffdcfc0c429.gif" data-mce-style="border: none; padding: 0; width: 200px; height: 146px;" src="/images/imported/www-urbanspoon-com/biglink-1ffdcfc0c429.gif" height="146" style="border: none; clear: both; cursor: default; display: block; height: 146px; margin: 0px auto 12px; padding: 0px; width: 200px;" width="200" /></a></div>
<div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
<h4 style="color: black; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: medium;">
<br /></h4>
<div>
<br />
<b>Life In Fort Worth By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a></b><br />
<h4>
<ul>
<li>New to the blog?&nbsp;<a href="http://www.lifeinfortworth.com/p/about.html" target="_blank">Start HERE</a></li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>Click&nbsp;<a href="http://eepurl.com/OjOcn" target="_blank">HERE to Subscribe</a>&nbsp;by email.&nbsp;</li>
</ul>
</h4>
<div>
<b><br /></b></div>
<div>
<b>What is YOUR favorite thing about Texas? Comment Below!</b></div>
<div>
<div style="color: black; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: medium;">
<b><br /></b></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
